title: ZXBrick Power-Ups
description: A practical overview of ZXBrick power-ups and how they support replayable brick-breaking arcade gameplay.
summary: ZXBrick includes multiple power-ups that add variety and replayability to the brick-breaking arcade experience.
sourceNotes: Power-up names, exact effects, spawn behavior, scoring interactions, and balancing rules are To Verify from app source before publishing as specific mechanics.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: ZXBrick includes multiple power-ups as part of its retro brick-breaking arcade design. The current website data confirms power-ups as a core feature, alongside 100 handcrafted levels, unlockable themes, achievements, leaderboards, and high score tracking.

sections.heading: Why Power-Ups Matter
paragraphs: Power-ups help add variety, risk, and replayability to ZXBrick without changing the core arcade focus. The development article [Designing ZXBrick Power-Ups](/news/zxbrick-powerups) explains the design background behind this system.
